task_completion.description: Locate the specific commons-lang3 artifact within the repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the artifact 'commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' or its tree path 'org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/' selected in the repository interface.

task_completion.description: View or copy the Maven dependency declaration for the artifact.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Maven dependency XML snippet displayed in the repository UI (often under a 'Dependency Declaration', 'Maven', or 'Snippets' tab).

task_completion.description: Open or create the target output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor (e.g., nano, gedit, VS Code) or terminal command creating/editing the file exactly at '/home/ga/Desktop/maven_snippet.xml'.

task_completion.description: Save the correct Maven <dependency> XML block into the file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually retrieved the snippet from the repository interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the repository UI to find the snippet, rather than the agent typing the XML from memory or hallucinating the content without checking the repo.

integrity.description: Verify the output file is saved to the exact requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the file path in the text editor or terminal to ensure it is exactly '/home/ga/Desktop/maven_snippet.xml' and not a different directory or filename.

integrity.description: Verify the saved content is a properly formatted XML block.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the saved text includes the opening <dependency> and closing </dependency> tags, and is not just a plain text list of coordinates.
